title: Supergirl | Trailer Tomorrow
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|James Gunn|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|trailer tomorrow
description:
Supergirl will call you back tomorrow. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

description:
#GreyHulk #DwayneJohnson #MarkRuffalo 

Watch This Grey Hulk Fan Made Concept Trailer

A military volunteer walks into a secret underground facility seeking purpose and walks out as a nine-foot nightmare of pure destruction. Dwayne Johnson transforms into the Grey Hulk, a titan of slate-colored rage born from a gamma experiment that tears apart everything science thought it understood. Harrison Ford commands with terrifying authority as General Thaddeus Ross, the decorated military leader who created this monster and now becomes one himself, injecting experimental serum into his own veins to rise as the Red Hulk. Amanda Seyfried stands between destruction and humanity as Dr. Elena Ross, a brilliant scientist forced to choose between her father's orders and protecting the tortured man she sees beneath the monster's skin.

When two Hulks collide across scorched deserts and crumbling cities, the shockwaves echo far beyond this dimension. Mark Ruffalo steps through a portal as the Green Hulk, drawn by a gamma pulse that called to him across the multiverse, arriving to help a fellow monster discover what he himself fought years to understand. Three titans now share one battlefield while a daughter defies her father and a soldier battles to reclaim his stolen humanity. Rage meets rage meets rage, and somewhere beneath all that destruction, one man fights to prove that even the darkest anger can find something worth saving.

description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense.

title: Melly Lee -  Tajamnya Karang | Official Music Video
tags: melly lee|tajamnya karang|mansyur s|tribute to mansyur s|3dent|mansyur s tajamnya karang|lagu dangdut|cover song dangdut|cover song|melly lida|coach melly|music video teaser|teaser mv melly|lagu selfi yamma|tajamnya karang karaoke|dangdut terbaru|lagu dangdut indonesia|tajamnya karang dangdut
description:
#TajamnyaKarang #MellyLee #3dentertainment #aTributeToMansyurS

Setelah Selfi Yamma sukses membuka project “A Tribute To Mansyur S” melalui lagu “Cincin Kepalsuan”, kini Melly Lee mengambil giliran untuk menghidupkan kembali karya legendaris lainnya milik Mansyur S lewat single Tajamnya Karang.

Melly Lee, penyanyi dangdut muda lulusan Liga Dangdut Indonesia (LIDA) 2020, menghadirkan interpretasi baru dari lagu ini dengan karakter vokalnya yang khas serta penghayatan yang kuat. Tajamnya Karang dikenal sebagai salah satu lagu dengan emosi mendalam, mengisahkan luka hati dan pengkhianatan yang membekas—dan kini dibawakan kembali dengan sentuhan yang lebih relevan bagi pendengar masa kini.

“Lagu ini punya emosi yang dalam banget. Buat aku, tantangannya adalah bagaimana menyampaikan rasa sakit dari liriknya dengan versiku sendiri, tapi tetap menghormati karya aslinya. Makanya ketika proses rekaman, aku tuh maunya lagu ini dinyanyikan sesempurna mungkin. Alhasil aku harus take ulang terus, karena aku selalu merasa ada yang kurang. Tapi alhamdullilah semua jerih payahnya terbayarkan. Aku puas sama hasilnya,” ungkap Melly Lee.

Single Tajamnya Karang dirilis hari ini, tanggal 30 Maret 2026. Lagunya sudah bisa didengarkan di seluruh Digital Streaming Platform, seperti Apple Music, Spotify, YouTube Music, Tiktok dan FB Music sejak pk.00.00 WIB. Sedangkan music Video-nya akan tayang di YouTube Channel 3D Entertainment di hari yang sama pk. 16.00 WIB.

Melly Lee pun membagikan pengalamannya ketika shooting music video. Dari sisi visual, music video Tajamnya Karang dikemas dengan konsep yang kuat dan berbeda. “Proses shooting dilakukan satu hari dari pagi sampai sore. Aku juga terlibat langsung dalam pembuatan music video ini mulai dari konsep aerial dance, pemilihan kostum, dan hair do. Pokoknya semua aku konsepin dengan detail demi menghasilkan visual yang mampu menyampaikan pesan lagu secara maksimal”.

Aerial dance dipilih oleh Melly Lee karena gerakan di udara dianggap menjadi simbol pergulatan perasaan yang tidak stabil, selaras dengan cerita dalam lirik lagu. “Ketika aku dapet single ini, aku tuh udah kepikiran pokoknya music videonya harus dramatis. Dan aku kepikiran gerakan-gerakan aerial dance tuh bisa untuk memperkuat makna emosional dari lagu ini. Fun fact nya adalah ketika aku latihan dance dan shooting aku tuh mual-mual bahkan sampai muntah karena memang gerakannya cukup menantang. Badan diputar-putar, terus kepala di bawah. Wahhh pusing deh,” tambah Melly Lee.

Ketika Melly Lee ditanya akan beri rate berapa untuk music video Tajamnya Karang, dengan cepat dia menjawab, “9,5 dari 10! Pokoknya aku suka banget!”.
Bagi yang penasaran dengan music video terbaru Tajamnya Karang dari Melly Lee, langsung saja ke Youtube 3D Entertainment. Selamat menikmati.

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCj4PjeVMnNTHIR5EeoNKPAw/join

▼Discord ドズル社サーバーへの参加はこちら！
ファン同士の交流や、視聴者参加型企画の募集を行っています
https://discord.gg/yNUS9W6a8K

▼ドズル社×LEVEL∞ コラボPC
https://www.pc-koubou.jp/pc/game_dozle.php

▼みんなへ

ども！ドズルです！

概要欄からこんにちは！
こんなところまでチェックしてくれて、ありがとうございます。

ドズル社のことをもっと知りたい！！！って概要欄をひらいてくれたのかな？
そんなあなたに、伝えたいメッセージを書きます！

ドズル社はみんなの「人生というゲームをもっと楽しく」することを目的に活動しています。
僕たちのコンテンツを通じて、たくさん笑顔になってくれると嬉しいです。
みんなのゲームに登場する愉快なキャラクターになれていますか？


応援の方法もたくさんあります。
動画を見る、コメントする、グッズを買う、イベントに参加する、
ドズル社を話題にする、おすすめする、イラストを描く、切り抜きをする。

そのすべてが僕たちのパワーになって、みんなのおかげで楽しく活動できています！
本当にいつもありがとう！！！


ただ、一つだけ約束してください。
応援しすぎて、疲れないように！！！
みんなに楽しんでもらうために活動しているので、応援しすぎて疲れちゃうのは本末転倒です。

自分のペースで、ゆるーくながーく応援してくださいね。
それが一番うれしいです。

今日、動画を見てくれた人が、
明日も、来週も、来年も、10年後も見たくなるような動画を作りつづけたい！

全部の動画を見なくてもいいです。
たまに動画を見てくれるだけでも、本当に嬉しいです。
好きな時に、ふらっと動画を見にきてください。


ドズル社は新しいチャレンジをして、アップデートします。
将来どんなことができるか、ワクワクです。
一緒にドズル社の変化を楽しみながら、人生というゲームを楽しみましょう！


ドズルより

BGM courtesy of https://www.epidemicsound.com/

＃ドズル社 #マイクラ #マインクラフト

＜STARGLOW PROFILE＞  
BMSG主催のオーディション「THE LAST PIECE」から誕生した、RUI・TAIKI・KANON・ GOICHI・ADAMの5人組ダンス&ボーカルグループ『STARGLOW (スターグロウ)』。
唯一無二のスタイルをそれぞれがそれぞれの形に尖らせ続け、奇跡的な融合を見せるボーイバンド。
クオリティやアティテュードはもちろん、言語化し難いカリスマ性やオーラに至るまで、全てにおいて創業以来BMSGが掲げ続けた理想像、音楽力を体現。
届きそうもない星に手を伸ばすが如く壮大な夢を追いかけ続け、いつしか輝く側としてこの世に舞い降りた彼等が、世界一大きな夢を叶えにいく。

＜BE:FIRST PROFILE＞
SOTA、SHUNTO、MANATO、RYUHEI、JUNON、LEOの6人組ダンス＆ボーカルグループ"BE:FIRST"。それぞれが歌・ダンス・ラップに対して高いクオリティとポテンシャルを持っているのと同時に、作詞・作曲・コレオグラフにまで発揮される音楽的感度の高さ、そして各々個性を持った華やかさが魅力。「BE:FIRST」と名付けられた彼らは、プレデビューから日本の各種チャートの1位を席巻。ここからアジア、そして世界へと向けて偉大なる最初の一歩目を踏み出す。2025年には4都市9公演を回り約30万人を動員したグループ初の国内4大ドームツアーを経て、初の海外ツアー「BE:FIRST World Tour 2025 -Who is BE:FIRST?-」にてアメリカ・アジア・ヨーロッパ全12都市を回り世界への躍進を果たした。
2026年5月には「BE:FIRST Stadium Live 2026 We are the "BE:ST"」初の単独スタジアムライブに挑むことが決定している。

A6.エペプロです。

A7.クリアするまでやるのでできます。

Q8.付き合ってください。
A8.無理です。ネットで出会い求めてません。

description:

「恋の終わりの名古屋にひとり」は、作詩に巨匠・たかたかし氏、作曲に弦哲也氏という黄金コンビによる渾身の作品。歌の舞台である、名古屋＝（“尾張”）と、恋の“終わり”を掛け合わせた掛詞がキャッチ―。掴みかけた幸せも束の間、すれ違いから好きな人と別れてしまった女性の切ない心情が描かれた、メジャーのメロディが耳に残る心地よい作品。

《プロフィール》

アソビシステムのアイドルプロジェクト「KAWAII LAB.」より2024年8月デビュー。

メンバーは、古澤里紗、佐野愛花、板倉可奈、増田彩乃、川本笑瑠、梅田みゆ、真鍋凪咲、桜庭遥花の8名。 数ヶ月にわたって、パフォーマンス審査やオーディション合宿が行われ、今回の8名が集められた。インフルエンサー、女優、アイドル、ダンサー、学生など異なるバックグラウンドを持ったメンバーが、それぞれの経験を活かしながらアイドルグループとして活動していく。

グループ名には、「どんな私（CUTIE）にもなれる、どんなところ（STREET）へだって行ける」、彼女たちにも、彼女たちと一緒にいる人たちにも、“なりたい自分”を見つけて欲しいという想いが込められた。

グループのコンセプトは、“KAWAII MAKER”。年齢も経歴も異なる8人のメンバーが“KAWAII MAKER”として、彼女たちの生み出した“KAWAII”を原宿から世界へ発信していく。

・古澤里紗（熊本県出身 / 2000.11.8生まれ）
・佐野愛花（東京都出身 / 2000.11.26生まれ）
・板倉可奈（千葉県出身 / 2001.11.11生まれ）
・増田彩乃（愛知県出身 / 2003.5.26生まれ）
・川本笑瑠（神奈川県出身 / 2002.4.22生まれ）
・梅田みゆ（熊本出身 / 2004.9.13生まれ）
・真鍋凪咲（神奈川出身 / 2004.6.28生まれ）
・桜庭遥花（北海道出身 / 2006.1.29生まれ）

title: TODO lo que NO VISTE en el Teaser de Harry Potter HBO 👀⚡
tags: el aquelarre de dany|harry potter|animales fantasticos|mundo magico|mundo magico de harry potter|el aquelarre de dany harry potter|harry potter español|teorias de harry potter|harry potter explicado|curiosidades harry potter|datos harry potter|analisis harry potter|explicaciones harry potter|jk rowling|harry potter hbo|harry potter max|serie harry potter|hbo|dumbledore|mcgonagall|snape|hagrid|quirrell|hermione granger|ron weasley|hogwarts|quidditch|malfoy
description:
En este video analizamos a fondo el primer teaser tráiler de la nueva serie de Harry Potter de HBO, revisando escena por escena todos los detalles, pistas ocultas y posibles revelaciones que nos deja este primer vistazo.

Hablamos de momentos clave como la interacción entre los alumnos de Hogwarts, el equipo de quidditch de Gryffindor, los nuevos diseños del castillo, la presencia de personajes como Snape, Dumbledore y Hermione, y teorías sobre escenas importantes como la sección prohibida, el Espejo de Oesed y la protección de la piedra filosofal.

También exploramos lo que este teaser podría estar adelantando sobre la historia, el tono de la serie, la importancia de la magia antigua y el posible desarrollo de personajes desde la primera temporada.

Si eres fan de Harry Potter, este análisis es para ti. ⚡

🎁 REGALO ESPECIAL PARA USTEDES 🎁

title: Supergirl | Trailer Tomorrow
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|James Gunn|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|trailer tomorrow
description:
Supergirl will call you back tomorrow. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

description:
Cardenales de Nuevo León Mix 🔥 Corridos y Norteñas Viejitas | Super Éxitos Inolvidables 2026
Cardenales de Nuevo León es uno de los grupos más representativos de la música norteña tradicional en México. Fundado a principios de la década de 1980 en Nuevo León, sus integrantes originales habían trabajado previamente en proyectos musicales locales. Desde sus inicios, definieron su estilo único combinando el encanto rústico de la música folclórica con una expresión profundamente emotiva, dejando una huella imborrable en su público.
Link: https://youtu.be/hCqryyF5wtA
Bienvenidos a Corridos del Rancho 🤠🎻
Un rincón donde la música cuenta historias de la vida en el rancho, la tierra, el honor y la tradición. Aquí encontrarás los mejores corridos clásicos, canciones que han pasado de generación en generación, llenas de sentimiento, cultura y raíces mexicanas.
En Corridos del Rancho revivimos las leyendas, las voces del pueblo y los relatos que nacen entre caballos, caminos de polvo y corazones valientes. Este canal es para los que sienten orgullo por lo auténtico y disfrutan el sonido tradicional del corrido.
🎶 Corridos antiguos
🐎 Historias del rancho
🌵 Cultura y tradición

Letra:

En palabras simples y comunes, yo te extraño
En lenguaje terrenal, mi vida eres tú
En total simplicidad, sería: yo te amo
Y en un trozo de poesía, tú serás mi luz, mi bien
El espacio donde me alimento de tu piel que es bondad
La fuerza que me mueve dentro para recomenzar
Y en tu cuerpo encontrar la paz
Si la vida me permite al lado tuyo
Crecerán mis ilusiones no lo dudo
Y si la vida la perdiera en un instante

Para amar después de amarte, vida
No tengas miedos ni dudas (que este amor es demasiado bueno)
Que tú serás mi mujer (yo te pertenezco todo entero)
Mira mi pecho, lo dejo abierto
Para que vivas en él
Para tu tranquilidad, me tienes en tus manos
Para mi debilidad, la única eres tú
Al final tan solo sé que siempre te he esperado
Y que llegas a mi vida y tú me das la luz, el bien
Ese mundo donde tus palabras hacen su voluntad
La magia de este sentimiento que es tan fuerte y total

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
tags: wifies|mumbo jumbo|dream|wifies arg|at the crossroads dont turn left|the king in yellow
description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

description:
#GreyHulk #DwayneJohnson #MarkRuffalo 

Watch This Grey Hulk Fan Made Concept Trailer

A military volunteer walks into a secret underground facility seeking purpose and walks out as a nine-foot nightmare of pure destruction. Dwayne Johnson transforms into the Grey Hulk, a titan of slate-colored rage born from a gamma experiment that tears apart everything science thought it understood. Harrison Ford commands with terrifying authority as General Thaddeus Ross, the decorated military leader who created this monster and now becomes one himself, injecting experimental serum into his own veins to rise as the Red Hulk. Amanda Seyfried stands between destruction and humanity as Dr. Elena Ross, a brilliant scientist forced to choose between her father's orders and protecting the tortured man she sees beneath the monster's skin.

When two Hulks collide across scorched deserts and crumbling cities, the shockwaves echo far beyond this dimension. Mark Ruffalo steps through a portal as the Green Hulk, drawn by a gamma pulse that called to him across the multiverse, arriving to help a fellow monster discover what he himself fought years to understand. Three titans now share one battlefield while a daughter defies her father and a soldier battles to reclaim his stolen humanity. Rage meets rage meets rage, and somewhere beneath all that destruction, one man fights to prove that even the darkest anger can find something worth saving.

Lương Thế Thành vào vai Hoàng Dũng – một CEO thành đạt nhưng đứng giữa ranh giới của trách nhiệm gia đình và những cám dỗ bên ngoài. Với kịch bản nhiều kịch tính cùng dàn diễn viên thực lực, “Bóng Ma Hạnh Phúc” hứa hẹn mang đến câu chuyện sâu sắc về hôn nhân, lòng tin và giá trị của hạnh phúc gia đình.

━━━━━━━━━━

🏆 THỂ THỨC PUBG GLOBAL SERIES 2 (PGS 2)

⭐ Nhánh Thắng (17h 26/03): 16 đội đứng đầu PGS 1 thi đấu 5 trận.
🔹 8 đội đứng đầu → Tiến thẳng vào Vòng Chung Kết (8 đội này sẽ Nhận Điểm Lợi Thế ở Vòng Chung Kết)
🔹 8 đội xếp cuối → Rơi xuống Vòng Sinh Tồn

⭐ Vòng Sinh Tồn (17h 27/03): 16 đội (8 đội xếp cuối PGS 1 + 8 đội xếp cuối Nhánh Thắng) thi đấu 5 trận.
🔹 8 đội đứng đầu → Lọt vào Vòng Chung Kết
🔹 8 đội xếp cuối → Bị loại

⭐ Vòng Chung Kết (17h 28/03 – 29/03): 16 đội thi đấu 10 trận để xác định BXH chung cuộc PGS 2 - Series 2.

✅ Điểm Lợi Thế là gì?
🔹  8 đội đứng đầu tại Nhánh Thắng (những đội giành quyền vào thẳng Vòng Chung Kết) sẽ nhận số Điểm Lợi Thế sau đây. Số điểm này sẽ được cộng trực tiếp vào bảng xếp hạng tại Chung Kết như sau: #1: 10 điểm - #2: 6 điểm - #3: 5 điểm - #4: 4 điểm - #5: 3 điểm - #6: 2 điểm - #7: 1 điểm - #8: 1 điểm.

description:
TOP 4 DẦN LỘ DIỆN, SGLX ĐẠI CHIẾN FPL | FVPL SPRING 2026 - KNOCKOUT STAGE

⚔️ Hai ngày thi đấu Knock-Out đã khép lại, và Top 4 góp mặt tại vòng Chung Kết đang dần lộ diện. Hai trận đấu mở màn ngày hôm nay sẽ xác định hai đội tuyển đầu tiên giành quyền tiến vào vòng Chung Kết diễn ra vào ngày 19/04. Trong khi đó, Team Flash và Legacy Esports vẫn cần thêm một chiến thắng nữa để chạm tay tới những tấm vé cuối cùng.

⏰ Liệu đâu sẽ là hai cái tên đầu tiên ghi danh vào vòng Chung Kết? Và liệu Legacy Esports - tập thể trẻ trung, giàu khát khao chiến đấu, có thể lần đầu góp mặt ở trận đấu cuối cùng của mùa giải? Tất cả sẽ được giải đáp vào 14:00 | 29/03 trên các kênh sóng chính thức của FC Online Việt Nam.

📅 Lịch thi đấu Knock-Out Stage ngày 29/03:
14:00 - Star Galaxy vs FPT Polytechnic (BO5) 
15:30 - NK FC Online vs TAKIO (BO5)
17:00 - M5-L vs Team Flash (BO5)
18:30 - M6-L vs Legacy Esports (BO5)

👉 Giftcode vô cùng hấp dẫn sẽ xuất hiện xuyên suốt livestream. Đừng bỏ lỡ nhé!

#FVPLSpring2026 #KickOffYourF4NTASY #KnockOutStage
--------------------------------------------------
EA Sports FC Online là trò chơi bóng đá trực tuyến miễn phí trên máy tính, được phát triển bởi EA Sports và phát hành bởi Garena tại Việt Nam. Trong game, bạn là một nhà quản lý, huấn luyện viên xây dựng và phát triển đội bóng theo ý thích của riêng bạn. Trong trận đấu, bạn là người điều khiển tất cả cầu thủ trên sân và trải nghiệm trận đấu bóng đá chân thực nhất. 
🔹 Trang chủ và tải game tại: https://fconline.garena.vn/
🌟 Kênh Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EASportsFCOnlineVN
🎁 Nạp thẻ: https://napthe.vn
🍻 Group cộng đồng: https://www.facebook.com/groups/easportsfconlinevn
🎮 Hướng dẫn và quà tân thủ: https://hocvien.fconline.garena.vn/

Đây là trò chơi duy nhất tại Việt Nam có bản quyền của 30 giải đấu hàng đầu thế giới như Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga…,hơn 700 Câu Lạc Bộ, hơn 19,000 cầu thủ, hơn 100 sân vận động, tất cả nằm trong series game bóng đá đã khẳng định danh tiếng trên toàn thế giới trong nhiều năm qua. Trò chơi được phát triển bởi hãng EA Sports, người “cha đẻ” của loạt game thể thao nổi tiếng khác như NBA Live,FC ,Tiger Wood PGA Tour...

EA Sports FC Online Vietnam là kênh youtube chính thức của FC Online Việt Nam, đồng thời là đơn vị duy nhất giữ bản quyền sản xuất toàn bộ nội dung game và giải đấu FC Online tại Việt Nam và do Garena chịu trách nhiệm

description:
২০২৬ সালে প্রচারিত ঈদের বিশেষ ইত্যাদির দুর্দান্ত সব আয়োজনের একটি ছিলো দুই ভুবনের দুই জনপ্রিয় তারকার একসঙ্গে গান। চলচ্চিত্র তারকা শবনম বুবলী এবং বর্তমান সময়ের জনপ্রিয় সংগীত শিল্পী ইমরান মাহমুদুল। পেশাদার সংগীতশিল্পী না হয়েও পেশাদার শিল্পী ইমরানের সঙ্গে খুব চমৎকারভাবে গানটি গেয়েছেন বুবলী। অভিনয়ে জনপ্রিয় বুবলীর টিভিতে গাওয়া এটিই প্রথম গান। বলা যায় এই গানটির মাধ্যমেই বুবলীর গায়িকা হিসেবে আত্মপ্রকাশ। অর্থাৎ ইত্যাদির মাধ্যমে নায়িকা বুবলী গায়িকা হলেন।

tags: Sami Yusuf|Mast Qalandar|samiyusuf|mastqalandar|qalandar|Qawali|Qawwali|Qawwali Music|Sufi|Sufi Music|Sufism|Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan|Atif Aslam|atifaslam|Noor|noor|qawali|qawwali|Traditional Music|Sami Yusuf & Atif Aslam|World Music Traditions|World Music|Classical Music|Human Music|Etihad Arena|Sami Yusuf Ensemble|Ya Hayyu Ya Qayyum|سامي يوسف|عاطف اسلم|باكستان|Pakistan|Pakistani Singer|British Singer|Sami|Yusuf|Atif|Aslam|نور|Abu Dhabi

Performed live by Sami Yusuf and Atif Aslam at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi in November 2025, ‘Mast Qalandar’ is a celebrated qawwali of the Indian subcontinent, deeply rooted in centuries of Sufi tradition. The piece is based on a devotional poem attributed to the renowned Sufi poet and musical pioneer Amir Khusro, later expanded and enriched by the verses of the great Punjabi mystic Bulleh Shah. Its lyrics express reverence (not worship) for Ali ibn Abi Talib—who holds central importance in Sufi spiritual lineage—and pay tribute to the revered 12th-century saint Lal Shahbaz Qalandar of Sindh.

Equally central to ‘Mast Qalandar’ is its powerful musical structure. Built on the traditional qawwali form, the piece unfolds through dynamic call-and-response passages, rhythmic handclaps, and a gradual intensification of tempo and energy. Driven by harmonium, sitar, percussion, and layered vocals, the music creates a state of spiritual elevation, where repetition and improvisation draw both performers and listeners into a shared experience of ecstasy. This intricate interplay between melody, rhythm, and vocal expression is what gives the qawwali its enduring emotional and spiritual impact.

Widely popularized in the modern era by Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, ‘Mast Qalandar’ has become one of the most iconic expressions of Sufi musical tradition, embodying themes of spiritual love and transcendence.

Performed brilliantly here by two contemporary musical icons.

#GreyHulk #DwayneJohnson #MarkRuffalo 

Watch This Grey Hulk Fan Made Concept Trailer

A military volunteer walks into a secret underground facility seeking purpose and walks out as a nine-foot nightmare of pure destruction. Dwayne Johnson transforms into the Grey Hulk, a titan of slate-colored rage born from a gamma experiment that tears apart everything science thought it understood. Harrison Ford commands with terrifying authority as General Thaddeus Ross, the decorated military leader who created this monster and now becomes one himself, injecting experimental serum into his own veins to rise as the Red Hulk. Amanda Seyfried stands between destruction and humanity as Dr. Elena Ross, a brilliant scientist forced to choose between her father's orders and protecting the tortured man she sees beneath the monster's skin.

When two Hulks collide across scorched deserts and crumbling cities, the shockwaves echo far beyond this dimension. Mark Ruffalo steps through a portal as the Green Hulk, drawn by a gamma pulse that called to him across the multiverse, arriving to help a fellow monster discover what he himself fought years to understand. Three titans now share one battlefield while a daughter defies her father and a soldier battles to reclaim his stolen humanity. Rage meets rage meets rage, and somewhere beneath all that destruction, one man fights to prove that even the darkest anger can find something worth saving.

title: Supergirl | Trailer Tomorrow
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|James Gunn|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|trailer tomorrow
description:
Supergirl will call you back tomorrow. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

Qu4troCoisas é um canal brasileiro de entretenimento, análise crítica e cultura pop criado por Pablo Peixoto o auto-proclamado youtuber que mais trabalha no Brasil. No ar desde 2011, o canal conquistou notoriedade ao apresentar conteúdos com um formato original e provocativo: em cada episódio, exploramos quatro elementos relacionados a um tema — o que é bom, o que é ruim, o que acabou e o que está surgindo. Daí o nome: Qu4troCoisas.

Com uma abordagem irreverente e cheia de opinião, o canal fala sobre filmes, séries, games, quadrinhos, música, brinquedos, nostalgia e fenômenos do momento. Além disso, o canal também conta com quadros autorais e personagens marcantes, como o infame executivo Carlinhos Brother, uma sátira ácida das decisões absurdas da indústria do entretenimento.

Com vídeos lançados com frequência, Qu4troCoisas também é um espaço para debates culturais, histórias esquecidas da mídia brasileira, análises de comportamento, e cobertura de tendências e polêmicas da cultura geek e pop.

title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
tags: wifies|mumbo jumbo|dream|wifies arg|at the crossroads dont turn left|the king in yellow
description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbldjZlI3Y2JVMm1FOURuaV9HRnI5bloxYWk2Z3xBQ3Jtc0tsNGctQ19SMGdrMURUUEE5VjBOdzV1QzYyYlIxeVRnR19RLTlfUGtWbF9GQmtFQVNCR2Vsam5pQWpuVDFiTTdzTWRzQkE3aktWUzd5TjBaOHpuUGtqVURwZXI3TFhtd0d2SWhlbVMtLXFTNTUyS3VHUQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fshare.epidemicsound.com%2F1xis5q%2F%3Fplaylist%3Duad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y&v=3V7Rvo4Gvic

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

title: Supergirl | Trailer Tomorrow
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|James Gunn|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|trailer tomorrow
description:
Supergirl will call you back tomorrow. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: Uncanny Cold Cases - Trailer
tags: uncanny|uncanny podcast|danny robins|uncanny cold cases|cold cases|uncanny trailer|cold cases trailer|paranormal|paranormal podcast|phantoms|poltergeist|team believer|team sceptic|team believer or team sceptic|dr ciaran o'keefe|evelyn hollow|uncanny community|danny robins podcast
description:
Each episode sees Danny Robins and paranormal experts Evelyn Hollow and Dr Ciaran O’Keeffe turn detective and investigate a historical haunting from classic cases like ghosthunter Harry Price’s infamous enquiry into Borley Rectory, and Britain’s most violent poltergeist, the Black Monk of Pontefract; to lesser-known ones, such as the nightmarish Sandown Clown on the Isle of Wight, and America’s original UFO abduction story, the Barney and Betty Hill Incident.

The Cold Cases team will pore over all the elements that have made these paranormal stories endure, sometimes over centuries, and put them under the magnifying glass. Danny will bring some of the most head-scratching, terrifying moments from the cases to life, telling the stories in his trademark terrifying style, and then the team will discuss the phenomena and look for possible explanations for what happened. Can the Uncanny team make sense of these strange cases that have haunted history?

Uncanny Cold Cases will be available on YouTube and BBC Sounds from 7 April.

tags: soul blues|modern blues|blues music|blues music playlist|relaxing blues music|relax music|slow blues|whiskey blues|blues music best songs|slow blues music|morgan luna|blues soul|morgan luna infinite love|soul blues music|emotional blues song|deep blues music|relaxing blues|love blues song|cinematic blues|blues 2026|soulful female blues|elegant blues music|blues playlist
description:
In the quiet depth of an emotion that needs no explanation, “Infinite Love” by Morgan Luna unfolds like a whisper that moves through the soul. This Soul Blues track explores a deep, calm, and transformative kind of love—one that doesn’t demand, doesn’t force… it simply stays.

With an intimate yet powerful vocal performance, the song tells a story of healing and rediscovery. The guitar answers with tender, expressive phrasing, while Rhodes and organ wrap every moment in warmth, creating a smooth, cinematic atmosphere that feels both timeless and deeply personal.

“Infinite Love” is not about promises or illusions, but about a real connection—the kind that grows in silence, holds you in the dark, and keeps breathing even when everything else fades away. A modern emotional blues piece for those who seek depth, soul, and authenticity.

If you’ve ever felt a love that exists beyond words… this song will find you.

It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: 【前導預告】「寒戰宇宙」強勢回歸！《寒戰1994》Cold War 1994 5月1日 戰雲密佈

description:
香港No.1賣座破億票房警匪系列電影再戰風雲！《 #寒戰 》 金像導演 #梁樂民 載譽領軍，10大影帝破天荒震撼列陣，2026香港揭開戰幕！《寒戰1994》5月1日，大銀幕共同見證，回歸前夕誰是真正香港話事人！

故事大綱
2017年，新一屆保安局局長候選人李文彬（梁家輝飾）突然失蹤，為此，警務處處長劉傑輝（郭富城 飾）向資深大律師簡奧偉（周潤發 飾）尋求協助，開啟了一份1994年的神秘檔案。
1994年，香港回歸前夕，政治部即將解散。一宗富商綁架案，讓熱血正義的李文彬（劉俊謙 飾）與冷血野心家蔡元祺（吳彥祖 飾），在警界掀起一場暗潮湧動的權力較量。首富家族潘氏父子（謝君豪 及 吳慷仁 飾）、警隊、黑道及英方四方勢力捲入其中，各有算盤、相互牽制，香港迎來了新一輪權力洗牌，並為2017年的寒戰風波埋下了伏筆。

title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
tags: wifies|mumbo jumbo|dream|wifies arg|at the crossroads dont turn left|the king in yellow
description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbldjZlI3Y2JVMm1FOURuaV9HRnI5bloxYWk2Z3xBQ3Jtc0tsNGctQ19SMGdrMURUUEE5VjBOdzV1QzYyYlIxeVRnR19RLTlfUGtWbF9GQmtFQVNCR2Vsam5pQWpuVDFiTTdzTWRzQkE3aktWUzd5TjBaOHpuUGtqVURwZXI3TFhtd0d2SWhlbVMtLXFTNTUyS3VHUQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fshare.epidemicsound.com%2F1xis5q%2F%3Fplaylist%3Duad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y&v=3V7Rvo4Gvic

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

title: Supergirl | Trailer Tomorrow
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|James Gunn|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|trailer tomorrow
description:
Supergirl will call you back tomorrow. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: Morgan Luna - Infinite Love | Soul Blues | Emotional Blues Music
tags: soul blues|modern blues|blues music|blues music playlist|relaxing blues music|relax music|slow blues|whiskey blues|blues music best songs|slow blues music|morgan luna|blues soul|morgan luna infinite love|soul blues music|emotional blues song|deep blues music|relaxing blues|love blues song|cinematic blues|blues 2026|soulful female blues|elegant blues music|blues playlist
description:
In the quiet depth of an emotion that needs no explanation, “Infinite Love” by Morgan Luna unfolds like a whisper that moves through the soul. This Soul Blues track explores a deep, calm, and transformative kind of love—one that doesn’t demand, doesn’t force… it simply stays.

With an intimate yet powerful vocal performance, the song tells a story of healing and rediscovery. The guitar answers with tender, expressive phrasing, while Rhodes and organ wrap every moment in warmth, creating a smooth, cinematic atmosphere that feels both timeless and deeply personal.

“Infinite Love” is not about promises or illusions, but about a real connection—the kind that grows in silence, holds you in the dark, and keeps breathing even when everything else fades away. A modern emotional blues piece for those who seek depth, soul, and authenticity.

If you’ve ever felt a love that exists beyond words… this song will find you.

title: 【前導預告】「寒戰宇宙」強勢回歸！《寒戰1994》Cold War 1994 5月1日 戰雲密佈
channel_title: 安樂影片 Edko Films Ltd.
description:
香港No.1賣座破億票房警匪系列電影再戰風雲！《 #寒戰 》 金像導演 #梁樂民 載譽領軍，10大影帝破天荒震撼列陣，2026香港揭開戰幕！《寒戰1994》5月1日，大銀幕共同見證，回歸前夕誰是真正香港話事人！

故事大綱
2017年，新一屆保安局局長候選人李文彬（梁家輝飾）突然失蹤，為此，警務處處長劉傑輝（郭富城 飾）向資深大律師簡奧偉（周潤發 飾）尋求協助，開啟了一份1994年的神秘檔案。
1994年，香港回歸前夕，政治部即將解散。一宗富商綁架案，讓熱血正義的李文彬（劉俊謙 飾）與冷血野心家蔡元祺（吳彥祖 飾），在警界掀起一場暗潮湧動的權力較量。首富家族潘氏父子（謝君豪 及 吳慷仁 飾）、警隊、黑道及英方四方勢力捲入其中，各有算盤、相互牽制，香港迎來了新一輪權力洗牌，並為2017年的寒戰風波埋下了伏筆。

《#寒戰1994》 #ColdWar1994
#梁樂民 #吳彥祖 #劉俊謙 #吳慷仁 #謝君豪 #王丹妮 #廖子妤 #周潤發 #郭富城 #梁家輝 #古天樂 #艾頓基倫 #AidanGillen #曉邦納威利 #HughBonneville

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). title: GTA 6: NEUE LEAKS! Unglaubliches Gameplay & Physik! Trailer 3 im August & 3 Milliarden Budget?!..
tags: ÜberGaming|GTA 6|Grand Theft Auto 6|GTA 6 Leaks|GTA 6 News Deutsch|GTA 6 Trailer 3|GTA 6 Release|GTA 6 Gameplay|GTA 6 Physik|GTA 6 NPCs|GTA 6 Budget|3 Milliarden Budget GTA 6|Rockstar Games|Tom Henderson GTA 6|Leonida|Vice City|SAG-AFTRA GTA 6|GTA 6 Karte|GTA 4 Beta|Xbox 360 Rockstar Games|Gaming Deutsch|GTA Deutsch|Grand Theft Auto|GTA 6 Infos|GTA 6 Gerüchte|GTA 6 Release Date|GTA 6 Spieletester|GTA 6 Update|GTA 6 verschoben|GTA 6 deutsch
description:
Haltet euch fest, denn in diesem Video schauen wir uns die bahnbrechenden neuen Leaks und offiziellen Infos zum aktuellen Stand von GTA 6 an! Wir sprechen über die verrückten Produktionskosten, die laut Dokumenten zu Rockstar Games das unglaubliche Budget von 3 Milliarden Dollar sprengen könnten. Außerdem packt ein Ex-Mitarbeiter über die neue, extrem realistische Glasphysik aus, während ein gigantischer SAG-AFTRA-Leak zeigt, wie aufwendig die NPCs in Leonida dank über 300 Synchronsprechern wirklich auf ihre Umgebung reagieren. Während Insider Tom Henderson unsere Erwartungen bremst und den Trailer Nummer 3 erst für August voraussagt, gibt es offizielle Entwarnung an anderer Front: Der Release bleibt fest im Zeitplan und wird nicht verschoben! Obendrauf zeige ich euch einen absolut verrückten Flohmarktfund – eine alte Rockstar Test-Xbox 360 mit exklusiven, gestrichenen Inhalten einer GTA 4 Beta inklusive Zombie-Modus. Lasst uns gemeinsam herausfinden, warum die Vorfreude auf Vice City und die neuen Tageszyklen berechtigt ist, bevor demnächst auch noch die Konsolenpreise steigen. Schnallt euch an, es gibt heute extrem viel zu besprechen!

Hey und willkommen! 
In meinen Videos tauchen wir tief in die Welt von GTA 6 ein und beleuchten alle aktuellen Leaks, Spekulationen und offiziellen Informationen rund um das heiß ersehnte Spiel! Wir analysieren detailliert die neuesten Gerüchte, diskutieren mögliche Schauplätze, Charaktere und Gameplay-Features und schauen uns an, welche offiziellen Fakten Rockstar Games bereits bestätigt hat. Außerdem werfen wir einen Blick auf Insider-Informationen und geben unsere Einschätzungen dazu ab, was uns in Grand Theft Auto VI erwarten könnte. Wenn du kein Detail verpassen willst, abonnier den Kanal und aktiviere die Glocke! Viel Spaß beim Zuschauen!

title: Minecraft NATIONS (Offizieller ANKÜNDIGUNGS Trailer) (Neues Projekt)
description:
Am Freitag den 03.04.2026 geht es weiter mit dem neuen Projekt ,,Minecraft Nations" ..
Minecraft Nations ist ein komplett basiertes RP Projekt mit PvP Elementen und einer Story die es so in Minecraft Deutschland noch nie gab. Nach den beiden erfolgen von ,,Minecraft Risiko" und ,,Minecraft Helden 1 & 2" - kommt nun ,,Minecraft Nations"..

Der Nachfolger von den Geschichten aus der ,,Youtuber Insel 2" - ,,Youtuber Insel 3" und ,,Minecraft Nachbarschaft".. Mit dabei sind viele Youtuber wie: Syou der unteranderem auch Minecraft Alarm gegründet hat, Ryney, Tridan, Zitachi, Ryan Cole und viele viele mehr.. 

Animation & Sounddesign im Video von: @ryney 
(Vielen Dank für deine Hilfe! Wir alle sind dir sehr dankbar!)

Was ist Minecraft Nations?

Es gibt 10 Nationen und jede Nation wird einen König haben sowie eine eigene Theme-Welt (Nether, End, Unterstadt, Affenreich etc.).

Zu jeder Nation gibt es einen sogenannten „Core/Nexus“. Wird dieser Nexus aus seinem Ursprung entfernt, verändert sich die Nation (Welt) ins Negative.
(Beispiel: Das Affenreich, das eigentlich ein Dschungel ist, fängt immer wieder an zu brennen und alles verwandelt sich Stück für Stück in Asche.)

Jeder der Könige hat 3 Leben und jeder der Side-Spieler hat 1 Leben.
Das bedeutet: Stirbst du in diesem Projekt, bist du für immer raus. (Hardcore-Welt)

Im Projekt sind: Syou, Tridan, Kiyan, Ryan Cole, LiveLuc, Danergy, Ryney, Yami & Amir

Im Laufe des Spielgeschehens passieren unerwartete Dinge – ein guter Spieler kann neutral werden, zur bösen Seite wechseln oder komplett einen neuen Weg als Tyrann einschlagen.
Die Welt ist endlos und man weiß nie, was passieren wird.

Es werden auch Special Guests geben wie z.b: StandartSkill, Embekay und viele mehr.
Die auch Rollen für kurze Episoden Stränge übernehmen werden. 

Das ganze Minecraft Risiko, Helden und Youtuber Insel Universum wird vertreten sein.

Ist es Minecraft Vanilla oder eher mehr richtung Sciene Fiction?

Verzauberungen und Minecraft Vanilla sind nicht so, wie sie sein sollten.
Im Verlauf des Spiels verändern sich normale Minecraft-Mechaniken.
Zum Beispiel: Man kann mehrere Verzauberungen auf ein Schwert machen, Wasser fließt plötzlich rückwärts nach oben oder man kann höher springen. Diese Veränderungen werden erst im Laufe der Zeit aktiviert und so wie die Story geführt wird werden sich Dinge auch verändern. Wir versuchen so gut es geht auf Vanilla Minecraft zu bleiben und nicht übertriebene Fiktive Sachen hinzuzufügen.

title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
tags: wifies|mumbo jumbo|dream|wifies arg|at the crossroads dont turn left|the king in yellow
description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbldjZlI3Y2JVMm1FOURuaV9HRnI5bloxYWk2Z3xBQ3Jtc0tsNGctQ19SMGdrMURUUEE5VjBOdzV1QzYyYlIxeVRnR19RLTlfUGtWbF9GQmtFQVNCR2Vsam5pQWpuVDFiTTdzTWRzQkE3aktWUzd5TjBaOHpuUGtqVURwZXI3TFhtd0d2SWhlbVMtLXFTNTUyS3VHUQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fshare.epidemicsound.com%2F1xis5q%2F%3Fplaylist%3Duad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y&v=3V7Rvo4Gvic

🎵 Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

title: Supergirl | Trailer Tomorrow
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|James Gunn|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|trailer tomorrow
description:
Supergirl will call you back tomorrow. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

Brawl Stars est un jeu mobile multijoueur développé par Supercell. Il propose des affrontements rapides et dynamiques en 3 contre 3 ou en solo, avec des parties courtes et intenses.
Le joueur incarne des Brawlers, chacun possédant des capacités, attaques et super-pouvoirs uniques. Le jeu offre de nombreux modes de jeu (Razzia de gemmes, Brawl Ball, Survivant, Zone réservée, etc.), renouvelés régulièrement.
Au-delà de l’aspect compétitif, Brawl Stars se distingue par son univers riche et mystérieux, son lore caché, et une forte scène esport internationale. Accessible mais stratégique, le jeu récompense aussi bien la maîtrise individuelle que le travail d’équipe.

본 유튜브 채널에서 제공하는 모든 콘텐츠는 시청자의 정보 이해 및 학습을 돕기 위한 참고 자료일 뿐이며, 아래 사항을 명확히 고지합니다.


투자 권유 아님: 본 채널의 어떠한 내용도 특정 가상자산 또는 투자 상품에 대한 매수·매도 추천, 투자 자문 또는 권유에 해당하지 않습니다. 모든 영상은 정보 제공을 목적으로 제작되었습니다.

투자의 책임: 가상자산 투자는 원금 손실의 위험이 매우 높은 고위험 투자입니다. 모든 투자 결정과 그에 따른 결과(수익 및 손실)에 대한 최종적인 책임은 전적으로 투자자 본인에게 있습니다. 본 채널의 정보로 인해 발생한 어떠한 손실에 대해서도 채널 운영자는 책임을 지지 않습니다.

법적·규제적 리스크 고지: 대한민국 법률상 미신고 해외 가상자산 거래소를 이용하는 행위는 특정금융정보법 등 관련 법규에 따라 법적 제재의 대상이 될 수 있는 리스크를 포함하고 있습니다. 관련 법률 및 규제는 언제든지 변경될 수 있으므로, 시청자께서는 본인의 책임 하에 충분한 법률 검토 후 이용 여부를 판단하시기 바랍니다.

정보의 한계: 본 채널에서 제공하는 정보는 제작 시점의 자료를 바탕으로 하며, 그 정확성, 완전성, 최신성을 보장하지 않습니다. 정보의 오류나 누락이 있을 수 있으므로, 이를 절대적인 투자 판단의 근거로 삼아서는 안 됩니다.

description:
In the quiet depth of an emotion that needs no explanation, “Infinite Love” by Morgan Luna unfolds like a whisper that moves through the soul. This Soul Blues track explores a deep, calm, and transformative kind of love—one that doesn’t demand, doesn’t force… it simply stays.

With an intimate yet powerful vocal performance, the song tells a story of healing and rediscovery. The guitar answers with tender, expressive phrasing, while Rhodes and organ wrap every moment in warmth, creating a smooth, cinematic atmosphere that feels both timeless and deeply personal.

“Infinite Love” is not about promises or illusions, but about a real connection—the kind that grows in silence, holds you in the dark, and keeps breathing even when everything else fades away. A modern emotional blues piece for those who seek depth, soul, and authenticity.

If you’ve ever felt a love that exists beyond words… this song will find you.

tags: Undertale|андертейл|undartale song|undertale cover|undertale песня|Bad time trio|bad time trio song|bad time trio на русском|bad time trio кавер|bad time trio песня|bad time trio undertale|sans|санс|чара|chara|papyrus|Папирус
description:
Какой чудесый день... Птички поют... Но у тебя настало ПЛОХОЕ ВРЕМЯ! ВТРОЙНЕ ПЛОХОЕ! Легендарная песня с трио героев Undertale! Санс, Папирус и Чара против игрока. И кто же окажется сильнее?

Bad Time Trio ВЕЗДЕ - СКОРО

Оригинал: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H2pCFVSi5tA

Спасибо за помощь всем ребятам, кто принимал участие в создании этого шедевра!

Основные голоса:
Санс - Аркадий ItAllCanWait @-ItAllCanWait- 
Папирус - Никита Филоненко @VOXPOPULARIS 
Чара - Gamma BadArt @Gamma-BadArt 

Музыка - https://vk.com/johankolt
Анимация - AlexVas @ykariPP
Текст - aisten0k945
Сведение и работа со звуком - @SataSaHer 

ПРИ ПОДДЕРЖКЕ СТУДИИ ЗВУКОЗАПИСИ "BMB RECORDS"

Привет! На связи ItAllCanWait, или просто Аркадий! Приветствую вас на своем музыкальном канале. Тут будут выходить ВСЕ мои треки! Кавера и сольные проекты. Располагайтесь и чувствуйте себя как дома!

Музыка Аркадия в одном месте - https://band.link/ItAllCanWait

Приятного просмотра!

Слова песни:
Мы снова здесь, ведь грядёт конец.
Друг, ответь: как давно уже наплевать на всех?
СтОльких ты убил…
Столько боли причинил!
Но учти - спасенья нет от кармы!

Мы снова здесь, ведь грядёт конец.
Мне скажи: 
Неужели веришь, что победишь?!
СтОльких ты убил,
Столько боли причинил,
Что тебе не избежать расплаты!

Мы снова здесь, ведь грядёт конец.
Делай ход, 
Помня, что всё было предрешено!
МнОгих ты убил,
Много боли причинил - 
Что бы ни сделал - пораженье ждёт!

Ладно, начнём, три на одного…
Ты готов?!
Только для чего было это всё?!
Впрочем, не спеши, в объясненьях нет нужды - 
Не найти причин для геноцида!

Видишь в окне? Что за чудный день! (Помнишь ведь?)
Полный птичьих трелей цветочный сад…
Но теперь о гибели твоей поёт набат!
Наше трио одолеть не в силах!

Изменяешь вновь таймлайны,
Но в сердце только страх,
Ведь мертвы все клятвы,
И надежда тает
Нет шансов - просто сдайся!

Как наивно верить,
Что твой выбор верен:
“Я должен!” вот умора!
Ты в оковах этой жажды крови…
Плюс не по мне пылью стать!

Здесь и сейчас 
Я тебя прикончу - 
Против троих, малыш, сдаться проще!
Хочешь снова? Ладно, пробуй,
Только ты не думай,
Что мы всё забудем!
Здесь и сейчас
Слушай душ стенанья!
Так для чего же эти страдания?
Ради смеха или мести?
Но плевать, если честно
Ведь не мне вершить здесь 
Суд
Грядёт, не найдёшь спасенья!

Всё к чему стремился ты, 
Больше не имеет смысла!
Всё вокруг…
Просто ВСЁ!
Гррр…
Не хихикай!

Правосудья час, что так ждали…
Действуешь всем нам назло?
Мда, связались с дураком!
Каждый грех тянет вниз, не… (Надорвись!)

Только ты можешь всё исправить!
Бьёшь, не замечая, что
Отражаем каждый приём
Ты один, ты без сил, не (выносим!)

(Нет шансов выжить,
Ты будешь гибнуть!
Раз мне не веришь,
Бей как и прежде!)

Мы уже начинаем злиться:
Все, кто был нам дорог - мёртв
Ну и кто здесь главный монстр?! 
(А я напомню:
Забыть не смогут!
Раз хочешь выйти,
Скорей ресет жми!)

Каждый друг,
Каждый вздох…
Ты почему не сдох?!
ТЫ
НЕ
СДОХ
Ладно, спросим вновь…
Для чего же всё?!

(Бой нам ни к чему)
Здесь для того, кто был другом, но
Маску сбрось! Ты и правда веришь, что победишь?
Даже если всё ради смеха сотворил - 
Нажми на сброс, начни вновь, и простим мы!

(Дай тебя вернуть!)
Здесь для того, кто бы другом, но
Нам позволь дать последний шанс, только не гони!
Даже если всё ради смеха сотворил - 
Нажми на сброс, начни вновь, и простим мы!

Выпад… Гляди,  грехов ты прибавил… (Чара/Папирус: Эй, умри скорей здесь!)
Не думай, что так оставим, покончим же с этим, 
Знаешь, как всё будет дальше… 
Хватит! Ты не понимаешь! (Чара/Папирус: На кон ставим всё!)
Нам ведь нужна справедливость и для
соратников наших!
В этой битве мы проиграли всё…

Санс: Видимо и правда всё, хах
Чара: Только не говори, что мы тебя не предупреждали!
Папирус: хех, готов поспорить, это ты и ожидал услышать, да, человек?

Все: Го.Ри.В.А.ДУ

Санс: СТОЙ!

Вот он шанс, в твоих руках!
Прошу тебя, верни назад (Чара: Всё верни! Подожди!)
Тот мир, где монстры жить могли,
И полон смысла каждый миг! (Не вернёшь ничего!)
Но ты всё в пепел обратил,
Ты стОльким смерть здесь “подарил”...
Я верил! Но знай -
Скажу лишь “Прощай”

Все:
Здесь под конец,
Даже без друзей 
Всё смелей 
Лишь вперёд идёшь, как сдержать тебя?!
Сколько пылью стало тех,
Кто верил в твой успех?..
О провале мы подозревали…

Жаль, что уже серый цвет везде - 
Не хочу думать, что могилу отыщем здесь!
Но теперь о гибели для нас набат поёт - 
Не хватило ведь тебе трёх смертей!

Нож в руках…
Упрям в бою, как и всегда.
Чем же сломать
Эту тягу всех убивать?!

Папирус: 
Не одолеть нам
Злобы твоей…

Вот бы не знать этот взгляд печальный никогда…

Санс:
Здесь и сейчас 
Я молюсь, чтоб ты пал…
Здесь и сейчас
Дух мой будет стенать…

Чарра:
Самый худший ты из всех людей - 
Будем вечно мы сражаться здесь!

#undertale #badtimetrio #андертейл

Gizlenenparator :D
Sizi seviyorum❤



Bu videoda kimliğimi gizleyip noob taklidi yapıp farklı kulüplere girdim ve vs attım. Yeni gelen brawl talk çok iyi gözüküyor. Kenji ile sıralamaya kastım ve prestij aldım. En kolay kupa kasma taktikleri ni verdim. Buzz ışıkyılı kupa kasma taktikleri. Aşamalı modda kolay şekilde aşama ve  lig atlama taktikleri verdiğim videolar da var. Brawl Stars a sıfırdan başladım daha önce de brawl stars sıfır hesaba kupa kasma serisi çektim ve brawl stars a yeni gelen karakter gigi oynamak istiyorum. Brawl stars ta en iyi kostümler i satın aldım . Brawl Stars kaze , kenji , gigi , ziggy , mina , mortis ve edgar oynamayı seviyorum. Hedefim en iyi brawl stars videoları çekmek ve Türkçe brawl stars videoları çekmek. Diğer videoları kaçırmamak için abone olmayı unutmayın. Enis20 kodunu kullanarak tüm kampanyalara ek %20 indirimle Kaspersky Premium'a aylık bir bardak çay fiyatına sahip olabilirsiniz: ► https://kas.pr/sa63

Dakikalar:
00:00 Crimson Desert Yorumlarına Bakalım
01:24 Dost ile Crimson Desert'a Yolculuk
02:18 Dost ile Crimson Desert Yorumları
02:25 Oyun güzel lan
04:10 Dost hala yeni bir şey öğreniyor
04:52 XP barı varmış
06:06 Kaspersky Sponsor
07:12 Kontroller berbat, Otomatik gitme yok
09:20 Hikayeye özenilmemiş
10:50 Sonuç iade
11:23 Bosslar salakça
12:31 LoL ve CS'den sonra süper geldi
13:11 Oyun devasa
14:34 Oyunum kitlendi
15:58 Resident Evil Requiem Yorumları
16:18 İkinci yarısı berbat
17:47 Korkunç değil, kahkaha attım (Tunca?)
18:37 Dost niye ikinci kısmı sevmedi?
20:00 Grace kısımları başyapıt
20:52 Grace kısmı biraz daha uzun olsaydı
21:32 Resident Evil 4 övmece
22:28 Capcom harika işler yapıyor
24:22 Dragons Dogma 2 kavgası 
25:04 Ubisoft'a söven adam
25:43 İncelemeler dürüst mü? Şirketler karışıyor mu?
27:20 rezil oyun be
28:05 Eksileri bile aynı sayıyorsunuz
28:40 İnceleme böyle olur
29:10 Kız hissini harika veriyor

İlk olarak konumuz bu ayın en popüler oyunu Crimson Desert, oyun  o kadar farklı tonlarda tartışıldı ki üzerine konuşmasından inanılmaz keyif alıyorum. Vallahi garip gelecek size ama böyle oyun tartışmaları her zaman denk gelmiyor. O yüzden kıymetini bilmek lazım :D Öğretici oluyor valla. Hangi insan ne sever, kimi insan neye takılır falan bu tarz tartışmalardan öğreniyorsun.

Diğer taraftaysa yine çokça sevilen bir başka oyun Resident Evil Requiem için yorumlara bakıyoruz. Aslında temel amaç eğlenmek ve Dost ile bir araya gelip oyun konuşmak. Gerisi bahane arkadaşlar :D

İyi seyirler dilerim!

title: PURPEECH Ft. SARAN - กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจ x สถานีปลายทาง [Official Video]
tags: purpeech|purpeechband|เพอพีช|MILK|เพลงใหม่|Saran|สรัน|New song|กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจ|สถานีปลายทาง|collab
description:
PURPEECH Ft. SARAN - กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจ x สถานีปลายทาง [Official Video]

กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจ x สถานีปลายทาง
Artist : PURPEECH Ft. SARAN
Lyrics & Melody : Sarawooth Suyaket & Saran Maneechot
Music : PURPEECH & SARAN
Produced : PURPEECH
Arranged : PURPEECH & FrameT
Mixed & Mastered : FrameT

“กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เจอเธอที่สถานีปลายทาง ◡̈”

Lyrics:
กว่าจะมีความรักที่แทนทุกสิ่งเรื่องจริงคือฉันและเธอ
กว่าจะได้มาพบมาเจอต้องใช้เวลาอีกนานเท่าไร
กว่าจะมีคำร้องและท่วงทำนองที่บอกว่ารักมากมาย
กว่าจะคืนดอกไม้ที่ร่วงโรยราต้องใช้น้ำตาอีกแค่ไหน

รักที่มันดูเก่าแต่เรายังจำได้ดีในความทรงจำสีเทาเทา
เฝ้านึกถึงวันที่เราอยู่ด้วยกันตอนนี้
และก่อนจะมีน้ำตาฉันยินดีจะตอบแทนหัวใจ
ถ้าได้ยินเสียงที่เธอนั้นบอกคำว่ารักกัน

กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งฉันจะลืมว่าฉันเคยรักเธอยังไง
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งใจของฉันจะลืมว่าเราเคยรักกันมากแค่ไหน
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งถ้ากลับมาไม่ได้พบกันใหม่
กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจกลัวว่าวันหนึ่งเธอหายไป ฉันกลัว

เก็บกระเป๋าออกจากบ้านแล้วฉันค่อยเดินทางตอนสว่าง
เปิดโทรศัพท์ปลดล็อกแล้วฉันก็เข้าไปดูที่พยากรณ์อากาศ
ว่าวันนี้ฝนตกไหมฉันจะนั่งรถไปหาด
ฉันเคยวาดทุกทุกอย่างเอาไว้แต่ทำไมมันดันกลับไม่มีเธอในฉาก

ยังมีอีกหลายอย่างที่เธอลิสต์รายการ เราจะใส่เสื้อคู่ใส่กางเกงลายพราง
ไปในทุกที่ที่เราสองอยากจะไปแต่เธอกลับไม่อยู่ในสถานีปลายทาง
กลับมาไล่เรื่องราวบางทีฉันคงจะผิดไล่เอื้อมดาวคืนที่มืดมนสนิท
ความรู้สึกมากมายที่ใช้อารมณ์ประดิษฐ์มีเพียงแค่เธออยู่ในอุดมคติ

คิดถึงตอนที่ฉันท้อแล้วมีเธอลูบไหล่ฉันไม่เคยชินกับรองเท้าคู่ใหม่
แต่ฉันก็พยายามจะเข้าใจว่าความรักมักจะสอนให้ฉันโตเป็นผู้ใหญ่
ภาพความทรงจำมันกำลังหยุดนิ่งในขณะที่ตัวฉันยิ่งขุด
กาลเวลามันจะสอนว่าให้ฉันหยุดวิ่งมันเป็นเพราะว่าจุดหมายไม่มีที่สิ้นสุด

ยิ่งจำฉันเองก็ยิ่งจุก เคยมีเธอเป็นที่สุด
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งฉันจะลืมว่าฉันเคยรักเธอยังไง 
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งใจของฉันจะลืมว่าเราเคยรักกันมากแค่ไหน 
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งถ้ากลับมาไม่ได้พบกันใหม่
กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจกลัวว่าวันหนึ่งเธอหายไป ฉันกลัว

มองท้องฟ้าแล้วฉันก็ขอจันทร์ขอให้ฉันเศร้าเพียงแค่วันสองวัน
หลังจากนั้นขอให้ฉันกลับไปย้อนกลับไปในช่วงปีสองพัน
ตอนที่ฉันยังเป็นเด็กยังไม่มีรักตอนนั้นฉันก็ไม่รู้ทำไมดีนัก
ไม่ต้องเจ็บไม่ต้องปวดไม่ต้องรวดไม่ต้องร้าวไม่ต้องมีพรากไม่ต้องมีพลัด

ก็แค่คนเฮงซวยฉันไม่มีทริกไม่ค่อยเติบโตเรื่องวิธีคิด
แล้วเธอจะให้ฉันลืมเธอลงไปได้ยังไงเพราะว่าฉันเหลือแค่เธออยู่ทั้งชีวิต
งั้นฉันขอให้เธอมีความสุขมากมากฉันจะทำเท่าที่ใจไหว
โปรดจำเอาไว้เธอมีฉันอยู่ข้างข้างคอยอยู่ตรงนี้ไม่เคยไปไหน

ละก็นะในตอนนี้ชีวิตฉันไม่มีความรื่นรมย์
ฉันชอบนั่งเหม่อมองธรรมชาติแล้วก็คิดว่าบางทีอยากจะเป็นคลื่นลม
ที่ยังคงเดินทางต่อไปแม้ท้องนภามันจะเริ่มมืดลง
แล้วฉันก็จะไม่ยอมถอดใจเพราะฉันมองว่าความรักนั้นคือความซื่อตรง
แม้ว่าความจริงมันจะช่างมืดมน 

กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจกลัวว่าวันหนึ่งเธอหายไป ฉันกลัว

เพราะฉันมีเธอคนเดียวคือเธอคนเดียว
และจะเป็นเพียงคนเดียวอยู่เสมอตลอดไป
อยากจะขอให้วันเวลาช่วยหยุดหมุนหรือเดินช้าช้า
ให้เธอกับฉันได้ทบทวนเรื่องระหว่างเราสมควรจบลงใช่ไหม

นัดกันแล้วเป็นหยังน้อผู้สาว

description:
เพลง “อโหสิกรรม” จาก Moodtune
เพลงร็อคเศร้าที่ถ่ายทอดความรักที่จบลงด้วยคำว่า “ปล่อยวาง”

เมื่อความรักครั้งหนึ่ง กลายเป็นเพียง “กรรม” ที่ต้องชดใช้
การให้อภัย…อาจไม่ใช่เพื่อลืม
แต่เพื่อไม่ต้องกลับมาเจ็บซ้ำอีกในชาติหน้า

🎸 มีทั้งอินโทรกีตาร์ซึ้งๆ และโซโล่ดุๆ กลางเพลง
💔 เหมาะสำหรับคนที่กำลังพยายามปล่อยใครบางคนออกจากชีวิต

—

🎧 เนื้อหาของเพลงพูดถึง

• และการขออโหสิกรรม เพื่อไม่ต้องพบกันอีก

—

📌 ฝากกดติดตามช่อง “Her&memory” และศิลปิน “Moodtune”
เพื่อไม่พลาดเพลงเศร้าโดนๆ แบบนี้อีกนะครับ
